content.text: Directions: Say at least five sentences according to the following mind map.You will have fifty seconds to prepare and fifty seconds to talk.(根据下列思维导图说至少 5 句话。你将有 50 秒的准备时间和 50 秒的表达时间)
Part Four: Free talk. Directions: Say at least five sentences according to the following mind map.You will have fifty seconds to prepare and fifty seconds to talk.

gradingInfo.gradingInfo:
- 核心评分点:结构完整性(30%)、内容充实度(30%)、语言多样性(40%)

- 考查重点:围绕指定话题(如“我的爱好”“环保”“科技”“校园生活”)，在1.5分钟内完成“开头点题+中间论述+结尾总结”，避免内容空洞、句型单一。

editableData.description: 自由表达 - 思维导图
